name: Honey Mustard Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 to 3 1/2 lbs. broiler chicken, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place the chicken, skin side down, in an ungreased rectangular pan, measuring 13x9x2 inches.
3. Mix together the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
4. Brush the mustard mixture over the chicken.
5. Cover the pan and bake for 30 minutes.
6. Turn the chicken pieces over and brush with the remaining mustard mixture.
7. Bake uncovered for an additional 30 minutes, or until juices run clear when the thickest parts are pierced.
8. If the chicken browns too quickly, cover with aluminum foil.
9. Discard any unused mustard mixture.
10. Makes 6 servings.
- Per serving: 275 calories, 115 grams of fat, 85 milligrams cholesterol, 250 grams sodium, 10 grams carbohydrates, and 29 grams protein
- Diet Exchanges: 4 lean meat, 1/2 fruit
